zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Keeble Sheriff of London於1445年出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親George Keble30歲，母親Mrs George Kebel26歲。他於1473年與Lady Joan Bryce在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1517年4月28日在他的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Keeble Sheriff of London于1445年出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲George Keble30岁，母亲Mrs George Kebel26岁。他于1473年与Lady Joan Bryce在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1517年4月28日在他的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Keeble
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): nickname from Middle English kibble ‘cudgel’, perhaps for someone who used or made cudgels or whose physique resembled one.
Americanized form of South German Kübel, a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, from Middle High German kübel ‘tub, vat’.

variants.name: Kibble
meanings: Altered form of German Kibbel or Kübel, a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, from Middle High German kübel ‘vat’, from Latin cupella ‘drinking vessel, grain measure’. Compare Kibler .

variants.name: Kibel
meanings: German: unrounded form of Kübel, a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, from Middle High German kübel ‘vat, tub’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Keeble Sheriff of London was born in 1445, in London, England, his father, George Keble, was 30 and his mother, Mrs George Kebel, was 26. He married Lady Joan Bryce in 1473, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 April 1517, in his hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Keeble Sheriff of London est né en 1445, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, George Keble, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs George Kebel, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan Bryce en 1473, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 avril 1517, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Keeble Sheriff of London 1445 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Keble 30 und seine Mutter Mrs George Kebel 26. Er hat 1473 in London, Middlesex, England Lady Joan Bryce geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. April 1517 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Keeble Sheriff of London è nato il nel 1445 nel London, England, il suo padre, George Keble, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mrs George Kebel, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan Bryce nel 1473, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 aprile 1517, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Keeble Sheriff of Londonが1445年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父George Kebleは30歳，母Mrs George Kebelは26歳であった。1473年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでLady Joan Bryceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1517年4月28日に故郷で72歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Keeble Sheriff of London(이)가 1445년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Keble(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs George Kebel(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1473년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Lady Joan Bryce(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1517년 4월 28일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Keeble Sheriff of London nasceu em 1445, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Keble, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs George Kebel, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan Bryce em 1473, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de abril de 1517, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary Aldermary, London, England: ст мэри алдирмэри вит ст томас т апостл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Keeble Sheriff of London родился в 1445 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени George Keble было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs George Kebel, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Bryce в 1473 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 апреля 1517 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Keeble Sheriff of London nació en 1445, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, George Keble, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs George Kebel, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Joan Bryce en 1473, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de abril de 1517, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
